calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Minor (Jade Wu)
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Minor (Wilson Wu)
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petitions to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of Two Minors.
Dept. 514; Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Stanley Shen, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yuquin Luo, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Jade Wu and Wilson Wu, neither of whom were present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Stanley Shen was placed under oath and testified.

Petitioner's Exhibit 1: Statement of Litigation Costs dated 2/9/16................In Evidence

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and compromise is approved as follows:

JADE WU:
Settlement Amount - $4,900.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,421.00.
Costs - $1,188.85.

WILSON WU:
Settlement Amount - $4,900.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,421.00.
Costs - $1,188.85.

The net balance of $2,290.15 for each of the two minors shall be disbursed to their Mother & Guardian Ad Litem, Yuqin Luo, and shall be held in trust by Ms. Luo for the benefit of the children.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of each of the Minors were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
